target.title: fix(agents): project nullable tool schemas for providers
target.body:
## Summary

- Project nullable and literal-union tool schemas into the OpenAPI-friendly provider schema shape used for runtime tools.
- Preserve runtime validation semantics for explicit `null` clear sentinels before provider projection.
- Cover the cron tool schema path that was failing current-main provider-compat checks and refresh the prompt snapshots affected by the projected schema output.

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs packages/llm-core/src/validation.test.ts src/agents/tool-schema-projection.test.ts src/agents/tools/cron-tool.schema.test.ts src/agents/tools/cron-tool.test.ts --reporter=dot`
- `node --import tsx scripts/generate-prompt-snapshots.ts --check` under Node 24.15.0
- `node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 packages/llm-core/src/validation.ts packages/llm-core/src/validation.test.ts src/agents/tool-schema-projection.ts src/agents/tool-schema-projection.test.ts src/agents/tools/cron-tool.schema.test.ts src/agents/tools/cron-tool.test.ts`
- `node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 test/fixtures/agents/prompt-snapshots/codex-runtime-happy-path/codex-dynamic-tools.discord-group.json test/fixtures/agents/prompt-snapshots/codex-runtime-happy-path/codex-dynamic-tools.heartbeat-turn.json test/fixtures/agents/prompt-snapshots/codex-runtime-happy-path/codex-dynamic-tools.telegram-direct.json test/fixtures/agents/prompt-snapshots/codex-runtime-happy-path/discord-group-codex-message-tool.md test/fixtures/agents/prompt-snapshots/codex-runtime-happy-path/telegram-direct-codex-message-tool.md test/fixtures/agents/prompt-snapshots/codex-runtime-happy-path/telegram-heartbeat-codex-tool.md`
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.json packages/llm-core/src/validation.ts packages/llm-core/src/validation.test.ts src/agents/tool-schema-projection.ts src/agents/tool-schema-projection.test.ts src/agents/tools/cron-tool.schema.test.ts src/agents/tools/cron-tool.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`
- AWS Crabbox changed gate: provider `aws`, lease `cbx_cbb1c631efeb`, run `run_4415ced3845b`, command `pnpm check:changed`, lanes `core`, `coreTests`, exit 0.

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: strict provider adapters should not receive `anyOf`/`oneOf`/`const`/null-type composition from runtime tool schemas when a provider-safe projection is available; runtime validation should still preserve explicit `null` clear sentinels.

Real environment tested: local Codex worktree for focused Vitest/format/lint/snapshot proof, plus AWS Crabbox Linux remote changed gate.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs packages/llm-core/src/validation.test.ts src/agents/tool-schema-projection.test.ts src/agents/tools/cron-tool.schema.test.ts src/agents/tools/cron-tool.test.ts --reporter=dot`; `node --import tsx scripts/generate-prompt-snapshots.ts --check`; `node scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs run --provider aws --shell -- "pnpm check:changed"`.

Evidence after fix: focused Vitest passed 3 shards with 114 tests; prompt snapshots are current; remote `pnpm check:changed` completed successfully in run `run_4415ced3845b`.

Observed result after fix: projected cron schemas expose provider-compatible plain `string`/`array`/`enum` shapes while raw tool validation keeps `agentId`, `sessionKey`, and `payload.toolsAllow` as `null` when the schema accepts clear sentinels.

What was not tested: live Telegram or full assistant-turn E2E; this PR is limited to runtime schema projection and argument validation contracts.

## Current CI note

The earlier failed rollup on `6fd8259d7c58068b9e58850aac944181bc5f93c7` included unrelated current-main failures outside this PR: `extensions/phone-control/index.test.ts`, `src/plugin-sdk/channel-entry-contract.ts`, `src/gateway/gateway-acp-bind.live.test.ts`, and `src/channels/message/types.ts`. The branch-owned prompt snapshot drift from that run is fixed by the follow-up snapshot commit.
